TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Ernest Bai Koroma = Mntucing hngkawas 1953 idas 10 jiyax 2 ka Ernest Bai Koroma ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Sierra leone ta sayang o kiya ka Ernest Bai Koroma, pnaah hngkawas 2007 idas 9 jiyax 17 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan.
S.PHON: = əɾnəst bai koɾoma = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas ** ɟijax * ka əɾnəst bai koɾoma ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan siəɾɾa ləonə ta sajaŋ o kija ka əɾnəst bai koɾoma, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan.
S.FORM: = Ernest Bai Koroma = Mntucing hngkawas 1953 idas 10 jiyax 2 ka Ernest Bai Koroma ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Sierra leone ta sayang o kiya ka Ernest Bai Koroma, pnaah hngkawas 2007 idas 9 jiyax 17 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan.
S.PHON: = əɾnəst bai koɾoma = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas ** ɟijax * ka əɾnəst bai koɾoma ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan siəɾɾa ləonə ta sajaŋ o kija ka əɾnəst bai koɾoma, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan.
